ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_code" TEXT /* Short code for the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team A */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team B */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match took place */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the referee */,
  "referee_experience" INTEGER /* Years of refereeing experience */,
  "referee_rating" REAL /* Rating of the referee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "successful_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of successful attempts */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts */,
  "average_per_match" REAL /* Average performance per match */,
  "success_percentage" REAL /* Success percentage */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "blocks_made" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the history is recorded */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "best_performance" TEXT /* Best performance in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., setter, outside hitter) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
